goal: Add a safe pilot path for embedding CopilotKit into the existing Django UI through an AG-UI adapter while preserving Django as the system of record and keeping the current AI sidebar as fallback.
global_constraints: Django remains the system of record for sessions, history, permissions, audit and tool execution.
Do not replace the current Django AI sidebar before pilot acceptance.
Do not expose Django AI gateway tokens to the browser.
Do not execute domain writes through frontend tools.
Use Copilot Runtime for production; direct browser HttpAgent is allowed only for local prototypes.
Disable CopilotKit telemetry by default in on-prem profiles.
Do not enable Copilot Cloud, hosted persistence or external analytics without a separate privacy/security review and ADR.
AG-UI state and events must not include raw PII, secrets, UNC paths, session cookies, full actor context or full prompts.
Preserve confirmation and audit behavior for all existing write tools.
Keep /chat and /chat/stream compatible until the owner accepts a replacement.
Update .desc.json and PROJECT_STRUCTURE.yaml after structural changes.
cross_cutting_acceptance: ADR-0027 is accepted or updated with the final decision.
The AG-UI endpoint streams valid lifecycle, text, tool and state events.
Existing Django AI chat routes continue to work.
Copilot Runtime connects to the AG-UI endpoint server-side.
The React island is gated by a feature flag.
Frontend tools are limited to UI actions.
Backend write tools still require confirmation and audit.
A user without domain permissions cannot read or mutate hidden objects through CopilotKit.
Telemetry is disabled in local-first/on-prem deployment profiles.
Operations and deployment docs describe enable, smoke, rollback and troubleshooting.
E2E covers the primary CopilotKit panel flow.
implementation_notes: Implement the AG-UI event mapper as a small separately tested module before adding CopilotKit UI.
Keep the first UI slice behind LOCAL_BUSINESS_COPILOTKIT_ENABLED.
Prefer same-origin /copilotkit routing in production to reduce CORS and CSRF complexity.
Map ui.open_right_panel as a safe UI command; never as a domain write.
Persist chat history in Django, not in CopilotKit cloud persistence.
Pin CopilotKit and AG-UI package versions during implementation because both projects move quickly.
deferred_decisions: Whether the first React island replaces the left sidebar in pilot mode or lives on a separate experimental route.
Whether to expose current MCP resources through CopilotKit mcpApps.
Whether generative UI cards are useful before right drawer rendering is exhausted.
Whether Settings Center should own the feature flag after the pilot.
Whether to persist AG-UI run metadata in a separate Django model.
Whether CopilotKit should be reused by the optional Tauri/PWA clients later.
